name: market-my-spec
description: Marketing for founders, in Codex. Three skills that work together: marketing-strategy (guided 9-step strategy flow), daily-plan (picks today's activities, manages your roster, scaffolds project-local skills), marketing-stack (infrastructure recipes: Reddit, Discord, Slack, Wix, Ghost, WordPress, Stripe, HubSpot, Postiz, Meta Ads, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, YouTube, Resend). Stack writes marketing/infrastructure.md so daily-plan reads one source of truth.

interface.shortDescription: Marketing strategy and daily execution for founders
interface.longDescription: Use Codex as your marketing strategist, then as your daily operator. Runs a guided 9-step strategy flow (brand, ICP, jobs-to-be-done, persona research, beachhead, positioning, messaging, channels, 90-day plan), wires up the infrastructure your channels need, and picks 1-3 activities to ship each day. Industry-agnostic: works for software founders, consultants, trades, services, and local businesses.
defaultPrompt: Build a marketing strategy for my business
What marketing should I ship today?
Set up the infrastructure my channels need
